foreignObject.h5:div: Ever since I started programming at around 14 years
old I have been fascinated by interactively exploring
ideas and finding problems to my mediocre
solutions. The projects coming out of that were
slowly but almost always for sure forgotten over
time, even by myself. In the last few weeks I figured
that to be a real shame and that I should start writing
down my ideas and solutions to them, especially
because technical writing is a skill I enjoy and want
